scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:mock: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend:mock" "npm run dev:frontend:mock"
scripts.dev:backend:mock: cd backend && USE_MOCK_DB=true npm run dev
scripts.dev:frontend:mock: cd frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_MOCK=true npm run dev
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cd backend && node server.js" "cd frontend && npm start"
scripts.start:mock: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cd backend && USE_MOCK_DB=true node server.js" "cd frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_MOCK=true npm run build && npm start"
